full_text:
Huan Yi (Gongchang) 桓彝 (公長)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huan Yi (桓彝), styledGongchang (公長), was born in Linxiang county, Changsha commandery. Killed by Sun Chen for claiming that Sun Liang should not be deposed. Huan Yi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Huan Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
